name: Scotch Teas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine margarine and brown sugar. Cook over medium heat until the butter melts.
2. Stir in baking powder and salt. Add oats and mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
5. Cut into bars.
